3273440.name: Sacrificio Demo
3273440.description:
GAMEPLAY
Play as the fast and agile gunman, with a wide array of guns, environmental and indirect ways of fight, and powerful kicks. Face off against disturbing creatures, and bandits, dodge traps, and solve puzzles.

PLOT
Two bounty hunters, investigating roadside kidnappings, discover underground ancient ruins being used to industrialize ritualistic human sacrifice, and turn humans into flesh monsters puppeteered by parasites. Now trapped they must fight to survive the extremes of human depravity in a desperate crusade for justice and salvation to victims.

WEAPONS
Use a variety of guns, swords, and the environment to survive the unholy slaughter coming your way like a Mauser c96s, Winchester rifle, shotguns.
3273440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
